master_row.title: Violation of Flat Universe Cosmology: Ω_k Neq 0
master_row.canonical_statement: cannot vanish for rotating systems. The constraint $\Omega_{\text{total}} = 1$ required by observations combined with $\Omega_{\text{rot}} > 0$ implies $\Omega_k \neq 0$, establishing non-zero curvature.
